subcodes.first_line: O thou who art inebriated with the wine of the Covenant! This is the dawn of the Divine Teachings and the time for the manifestation of heavenly bounties [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرمست جام میثاق وقت اشراق نور تعالیم الهی است و هنگام جلوه فیض رحمانی
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation
